changeSet.author: pkomena
changeSet.comment: Lier le test 'Nombre de flore' au sample type 'Sang (hémoculture)'
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO clinlims.sampletype_test (id, sample_type_id, test_id) SELECT nextval('sample_type_test_seq'), st.id, t.id FROM clinlims.type_of_sample st JOIN clinlims.test t ON t.name = 'Microscopie - Frottis Coloration Gram - Bactéries - Nombre de flore' WHERE st.description = 'Sang (hémoculture)' AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM clinlims.sampletype_test stt WHERE stt.sample_type_id = st.id AND stt.test_id = t.id );

changeSet.author: pkomena
changeSet.comment: Ajouter le test 'Nombre de flore' au panel ECB-Sang
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO clinlims.panel_item (id, panel_id, lastupdated, test_id) SELECT nextval('panel_item_seq'), p.id, now(), t.id FROM clinlims.panel p JOIN clinlims.test t ON t.name = 'Microscopie - Frottis Coloration Gram - Bactéries - Nombre de flore' WHERE p.name = 'ECB-Sang' AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM clinlims.panel_item pi WHERE pi.panel_id = p.id AND pi.test_id = t.id );
